历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 8322 → 8599 → 9082 → 12494 → 13975, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5400 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 13975; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 69 → 75 → 82 → 86 → 99, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 108, an additional 9.1% expansion compared to 2025, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026: 56th → 57th → 62nd → 57th → 56th → 51st, with stable improvement in recent years, entering the top 51 in 2026, indicating recognition of the university's comprehensive strength; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places), but overall impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, increasing attention for applications; no obvious gaps in admission records; Marine Science A+, Aquaculture A+, Food Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-, with marine and aquaculture disciplines top in the country, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors are highly popular and recommended, closely related to the university's engineering enrollment; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province from 2021 to 2025 continuously increased (232461 → 286062 → 298845 → 313412 → 320779), with total candidates in 2026 at 451000, estimated Physics Category about 312994 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 2.4% compared to 2025, easing competitive pressure slightly; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, a popular coastal city, attracting some candidates from Anhui; the university has a large enrollment scale in this province (108 in Physics Category for 2026), making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the 9.1% expansion in 2026, the stable rise in university ranking, the relatively hot Douyin popularity, and the slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 13975, competition is expected to continue intensifying but with limited magnitude; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14687, with a range of 14187–15187.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 1474 → 1863 → 1887 → 1546 → 1673, showing overall large fluctuations, with a decline and stabilization from 2021 to 2023, a rebound to 1546 in 2024, and a slight drop to 1673 in 2025; the 2025 baseline is about 1673rd place; the provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 22 → 23 → 26 → 24 → 15 students, with a significant reduction to 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24 students, a 60% expansion compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 51st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years, gaining recognition for overall strength; reputation was slightly negative in 2023 (minor language majors dropped 6211 places), but overall impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), with increased attention for applications; Marine Science A+, Aquaculture A+, Food Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-, with marine and fisheries disciplines nationally top-tier, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and other liberal arts majors are socially recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; provincial History Category examinees from 2021 to 2025 fluctuated (195661 → 182811 → 149688 → 135237 → 141400), with total examinees in 2026 at 451,000, estimated History Category about 138,006 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 2.4% from 2025, slightly easing competition and slightly increasing; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, a popular coastal city, with some regional appeal to Anhui examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking baseline, the 60% expansion in 2026 enrollment plan, the steady rise in school ranking, the hot Douyin popularity, and the slight decrease in provincial History Category examinees, competition is expected to significantly ease based on the 2025 baseline of 1673rd place; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2255th place, with a range of 1849–2661st place.
